ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Latest reported revenue */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the statement corresponds to */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period the statement corresponds to (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the financial statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date the statement was prepared */,
  "audited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the financial statement has been audited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statement_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income statement item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the income statement item (e.g., Revenue, Cost of Revenue, Gross Profit) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value of the income statement item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the income statement item (e.g., Revenue, Expenses) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income statement item */,
  "item_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item value (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statement_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheet_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the balance sheet item (e.g., Cash and Cash Equivalents, Accounts Payable, Shareholders' Equity) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value of the balance sheet item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the balance sheet item (e.g., Assets, Liabilities, Equity) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the balance sheet item */,
  "item_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item value (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheet_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., Operating Budget, Capital Budget) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the budget corresponds to */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period the budget corresponds to (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "budget_version" INTEGER /* Version of the budget */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget item (e.g., Projected Revenue, Projected Expense) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value of the budget item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget item (e.g., Revenue, Expenses) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget item */,
  "item_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item value (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., Revenue Forecast, Expense Forecast) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the forecast corresponds to */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period the forecast corresponds to (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "forecast_version" INTEGER /* Version of the forecast */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast item */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast item (e.g., Projected Revenue, Projected Expense) */,
  "item_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the forecast item (e.g., Revenue, Expenses) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the forecast item */,
  "item_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item value (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_items_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data is being accessed */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
